MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name, s.id ORDER BY s.name
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P001'}) RETURN p.name, p.email, p.dateOfBirth
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'active' RETURN t.id, t.model, t.capacity
MATCH (t:Ticket {id: 'TK42'}) SET t.status = 'cancelled', t.cancelledAt = datetime() RETURN t
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'})<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN t.id, t.model, t.departureTime ORDER BY t.departureTime
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE p.id = 'P001' RETURN r.name, tk.price, tk.purchaseDate ORDER BY tk.purchaseDate DESC
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) WHERE m.scheduledDate > date() RETURN t.id, t.model, m.maintenanceType, m.scheduledDate ORDER BY m.scheduledDate
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.severity = 'high' AND i.timestamp > datetime() - duration('P7D') RETURN i.description, i.timestamp, r.name ORDER BY i.timestamp DESC
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(pl:Platform) WITH s, count(pl) AS platformCount WHERE platformCount > 3 RETURN s.name, platformCount ORDER BY platformCount DESC
MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:HOLDS]-(p:Passenger) WHERE tc.expiryDate < date() + duration('P30D') AND tc.expiryDate >= date() SET tc.flagged = true RETURN p.name, p.email, tc.cardNumber, tc.expiryDate

MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(t:Train) WITH d, count(t) AS trainCount, collect(t.status) AS statuses RETURN d.name, d.location, trainCount, size([s IN statuses WHERE s = 'under_maintenance']) AS underMaintenance ORDER BY trainCount DESC

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:BOARDED]-(p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH r, count(DISTINCT p) AS uniquePassengers, sum(tk.price) AS totalRevenue RETURN r.name, uniquePassengers, totalRevenue ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'North Terminal'}), (s2:Station {name: 'South Hub'}), path = shortestPath((s1)-[:CONNECTS_TO*]-(s2)) RETURN [node IN nodes(path) | node.name] AS stationPath, length(path) AS hops

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:OPERATES]->(t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH sm, collect(DISTINCT s.name) AS stationsCovered, count(DISTINCT t) AS trainsOperated WHERE trainsOperated > 2 RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, trainsOperated, stationsCovered

MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.logDate >= date() - duration('P90D') WITH dpl.stationId AS stationId, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgDaily, max(dpl.passengerCount) AS peakDay MATCH (s:Station {id: stationId}) RETURN s.name, round(avgDaily) AS avgDailyPassengers, peakDay ORDER BY avgDaily DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p, count(tk) AS ticketCount, sum(tk.price) AS totalSpent WHERE totalSpent > 500 MATCH (p)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, p.id, ticketCount, totalSpent, tc.cardType, tc.expiryDate ORDER BY totalSpent DESC

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH r, count(i) AS incidentCount MATCH (r)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WITH r, incidentCount, count(j) AS totalJourneys WHERE totalJourneys > 0 WITH r, incidentCount, totalJourneys, round(100.0 * incidentCount / totalJourneys * 100) / 100 AS incidentRatePct ORDER BY incidentRatePct DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN r.name, r.id, incidentCount, totalJourneys, incidentRatePct

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.saleDate >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH tss.ticketType AS ticketType, sum(tss.totalSales) AS annualRevenue, sum(tss.ticketCount) AS totalTickets, avg(tss.averagePrice) AS avgPrice RETURN ticketType, annualRevenue, totalTickets, round(avgPrice * 100) / 100 AS avgPrice ORDER BY annualRevenue DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j1:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r1:Route), (p)-[:BOARDED]->(j2:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r2:Route) WHERE r1 <> r2 AND j1.date = j2.date AND j2.departureTime > j1.arrivalTime AND duration.between(j1.arrivalTime, j2.departureTime).minutes < 30 WITH p, count(DISTINCT j1.date) AS connectionDays RETURN p.name, p.id, connectionDays ORDER BY connectionDays DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH s, r, collect(DISTINCT t.id) AS trainIds, count(DISTINCT t) AS serviceFrequency MATCH (s)<-[:AFFECTED_STATION]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp > datetime() - duration('P30D') WITH s, r, serviceFrequency, count(i) AS recentIncidents MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: s.id}) WHERE dpl.logDate > date() - duration('P30D') WITH s, r, serviceFrequency, recentIncidents, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgPassengers WHERE avgPassengers > 100 RETURN s.name, r.name, serviceFrequency, recentIncidents, round(avgPassengers) AS avgDailyPassengers, round(recentIncidents * 1000.0 / avgPassengers * 100) / 100 AS incidentsPer1000Passengers ORDER BY incidentsPer1000Passengers DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'under_maintenance' RETURN t.id, t.model, t.lastServiceDate ORDER BY t.lastServiceDate ASC
MATCH (p:Platform) WHERE p.status = 'closed' RETURN p.id, p.platformNumber, p.closureReason, p.closureDate
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P042'}) SET p.contactEmail = 'newemail@example.com', p.updatedAt = datetime() RETURN p.name, p.contactEmail
MATCH (tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.travelDate < date() AND tk.status = 'unused' SET tk.status = 'expired' RETURN count(tk) AS expiredTickets
MATCH (r:Route) RETURN r.id, r.name, r.totalDistance, r.estimatedDuration ORDER BY r.totalDistance DESC
MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.role = 'conductor' RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, sm.hireDate ORDER BY sm.hireDate ASC
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.status = 'overdue' RETURN ml.id, ml.maintenanceType, ml.scheduledDate, ml.priority ORDER BY ml.scheduledDate ASC
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'East Junction'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(pl:Platform)<-[:ARRIVES_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN pl.platformNumber, t.id, t.arrivalTime ORDER BY t.arrivalTime
MATCH (tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.cardType = 'monthly' AND tc.isActive = true RETURN count(tc) AS activeMonthlycards, avg(tc.remainingBalance) AS avgBalance
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date = date() RETURN count(DISTINCT p) AS todayPassengers
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.status = 'open' WITH i ORDER BY i.timestamp DESC RETURN i.id, i.severity, i.description, i.timestamp, i.reportedBy LIMIT 25
MATCH (t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot {name: 'Northgate Depot'}) SET t.homeDepot = 'Northgate Depot' RETURN count(t) AS updatedTrains
MATCH (r:Route)-[:STARTS_AT]->(s1:Station), (r)-[:ENDS_AT]->(s2:Station) RETURN r.name, s1.name AS origin, s2.name AS destination, r.totalDistance ORDER BY r.totalDistance

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.purchaseDate >= date() - duration('P7D') WITH date(tk.purchaseDate) AS saleDate, count(tk) AS dailySales, sum(tk.price) AS dailyRevenue RETURN saleDate, dailySales, dailyRevenue ORDER BY saleDate
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, count(s) AS stopCount WHERE stopCount > 10 RETURN t.id, t.model, stopCount ORDER BY stopCount DESC
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WITH s, count(t) AS serviceCount ORDER BY serviceCount DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN s.name, s.id, serviceCount

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.remainingBalance < 10 AND tc.isActive = true RETURN p.name, p.id, p.contactEmail, tc.cardNumber, tc.remainingBalance ORDER BY tc.remainingBalance ASC
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE j.status = 'delayed' WITH r, count(j) AS delayedJourneys RETURN r.name, delayedJourneys ORDER BY delayedJourneys DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:RESPONDED_TO]->(i:Incident) WITH sm, count(i) AS incidentsHandled WHERE incidentsHandled >= 3 RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, sm.role, incidentsHandled ORDER BY incidentsHandled DESC

MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.lastServiceDate < date() - duration('P180D') RETURN t.id, t.model, t.lastServiceDate, duration.between(t.lastServiceDate, date()).days AS daysSinceService ORDER BY daysSinceService DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE j.status = 'cancelled' WITH p, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS affectedRoutes, sum(tk.price) AS refundAmount RETURN p.name, p.id, p.contactEmail, affectedRoutes, refundAmount ORDER BY refundAmount DESC
MATCH (s:Station)-[:CONNECTS_TO]->(s2:Station) WITH s, count(s2) AS connections WHERE connections = 1 RETURN s.name, s.id, connections AS connectionsCount ORDER BY s.name

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.saleDate >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH tss.saleDate AS day, sum(tss.totalSales) AS revenue ORDER BY day WITH collect({day: day, revenue: revenue}) AS trend RETURN trend

MATCH (t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WHERE j.actualArrival > j.scheduledArrival WITH r, j, duration.between(j.scheduledArrival, j.actualArrival).minutes AS delayMinutes WHERE delayMinutes > 0 WITH r, avg(delayMinutes) AS avgDelay, max(delayMinutes) AS maxDelay, count(j) AS delayedServices RETURN r.name, round(avgDelay * 10) / 10 AS avgDelayMins, maxDelay AS maxDelayMins, delayedServices ORDER BY avgDelay DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey) WITH p, count(j) AS journeyCount, min(j.date) AS firstJourney, max(j.date) AS lastJourney WHERE journeyCount > 50 RETURN p.name, p.id, journeyCount, firstJourney, lastJourney, duration.between(firstJourney, lastJourney).days AS activeDays ORDER BY journeyCount DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (pl:Platform)<-[:DEPARTS_FROM]-(t:Train) WITH pl, count(t) AS departures MATCH (pl)<-[:ARRIVES_AT]-(t2:Train) WITH pl, departures, count(t2) AS arrivals MATCH (pl)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(s:Station) RETURN s.name, pl.platformNumber, departures, arrivals, departures + arrivals AS totalMovements ORDER BY totalMovements DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey)<-[:BOARDED]-(p:Passenger) WHERE i.timestamp > datetime() - duration('P90D') WITH i, count(DISTINCT p) AS passengersAffected RETURN i.id, i.severity, i.description, i.timestamp, passengersAffected ORDER BY passengersAffected DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:OPERATES]->(t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE r.name IN ['Express North', 'City Circle', 'Airport Link'] WITH sm, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS routesCovered WHERE size(routesCovered) = 3 RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, routesCovered

MATCH (t:Train)-[:STORED_AT]->(d:Depot) MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t) WITH d, t, count(ml) AS maintenanceCount, max(ml.scheduledDate) AS lastMaintenance RETURN d.name, t.id, t.model, maintenanceCount, lastMaintenance ORDER BY d.name, maintenanceCount DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p, sum(tk.price) AS totalSpent, count(tk) AS purchaseCount WITH p, totalSpent, purchaseCount, totalSpent / purchaseCount AS avgTicketPrice MATCH (p)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.isActive = true WITH p, totalSpent, purchaseCount, avgTicketPrice, tc.cardType AS cardType RETURN cardType, count(p) AS passengers, round(avg(totalSpent) * 100) / 100 AS avgSpend, round(avg(avgTicketPrice) * 100) / 100 AS avgTicketPrice ORDER BY avgSpend DESC

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH s, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS routes, count(DISTINCT t) AS trainFrequency MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: s.id}) WHERE dpl.logDate >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH s, routes, trainFrequency, sum(dpl.passengerCount) AS monthlyPassengers WHERE monthlyPassengers > 5000 RETURN s.name, size(routes) AS routeCount, trainFrequency, monthlyPassengers ORDER BY monthlyPassengers DESC

MATCH (r1:Route)-[:CONNECTS_TO]->(hub:Station)<-[:CONNECTS_TO]-(r2:Route) WHERE r1 <> r2 WITH hub, count(DISTINCT r1) AS intersectingRoutes MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: hub.id}) WITH hub, intersectingRoutes, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgDailyLoad RETURN hub.name, intersectingRoutes, round(avgDailyLoad) AS avgDailyPassengers, round(avgDailyLoad / intersectingRoutes) AS loadPerRoute ORDER BY avgDailyLoad DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH r, j.date.month AS month, count(j) AS journeyCount, sum(j.passengerCount) AS totalPassengers WITH r, month, journeyCount, totalPassengers ORDER BY r.name, month RETURN r.name, collect({month: month, journeys: journeyCount, passengers: totalPassengers}) AS monthlyBreakdown

MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, collect({station: s.name, order: s.stopOrder, arrivalTime: s.scheduledArrival}) AS stops WHERE size(stops) > 5 MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t) WHERE ml.status = 'completed' WITH t, stops, count(ml) AS completedMaintenances, max(ml.completedDate) AS lastServiced RETURN t.id, t.model, t.status, size(stops) AS totalStops, completedMaintenances, lastServiced ORDER BY completedMaintenances DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, r, count(j) AS timesOnRoute ORDER BY timesOnRoute DESC WITH p, collect({route: r.name, count: timesOnRoute})[0] AS favouriteRoute MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p, favouriteRoute, sum(tk.price) AS lifetimeSpend WHERE lifetimeSpend > 200 RETURN p.name, p.id, favouriteRoute.route AS mostUsedRoute, favouriteRoute.count AS tripsOnFavRoute, lifetimeSpend ORDER BY lifetimeSpend DESC LIMIT 25

MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime() - duration('P365D') WITH i.timestamp.month AS month, i.severity AS severity, count(i) AS incidentCount RETURN month, severity, incidentCount ORDER BY month, CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

MATCH (tc:TravelCard)<-[:HOLDS]-(p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH tc.cardType AS cardType, count(DISTINCT p) AS activeCardholders, count(j) AS totalJourneys, avg(j.passengerCount) AS avgLoad MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary {ticketType: cardType}) WHERE tss.saleDate >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH cardType, activeCardholders, totalJourneys, avgLoad, sum(tss.totalSales) AS revenueGenerated RETURN cardType, activeCardholders, totalJourneys, round(avgLoad * 10) / 10 AS avgJourneyLoad, revenueGenerated, round(revenueGenerated / activeCardholders * 100) / 100 AS revenuePerCardholder ORDER BY revenueGenerated DESC

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WITH s, t MATCH (t)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime() - duration('P90D') WITH s, count(DISTINCT i) AS nearbyIncidents MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t2:Train) WITH s, nearbyIncidents, count(DISTINCT t2) AS serviceCount MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: s.id}) WHERE dpl.logDate >= date() - duration('P90D') WITH s, nearbyIncidents, serviceCount, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgPassengers WHERE avgPassengers > 0 RETURN s.name, nearbyIncidents, serviceCount, round(avgPassengers) AS avgDailyPassengers, round(nearbyIncidents * 100.0 / serviceCount * 100) / 100 AS incidentToServiceRatio ORDER BY incidentToServiceRatio DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, r, min(j.date) AS firstTrip, max(j.date) AS lastTrip, count(j) AS tripCount, sum(tk.price) AS routeSpend WITH p, collect({route: r.name, firstTrip: firstTrip, lastTrip: lastTrip, trips: tripCount, spend: routeSpend}) AS routeHistory, sum(tripCount) AS totalTrips, sum(routeSpend) AS totalSpend WHERE totalTrips >= 20 MATCH (p)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) RETURN p.name, p.id, tc.cardType, totalTrips, totalSpend, size(routeHistory) AS distinctRoutes, [rh IN routeHistory WHERE rh.trips = reduce(mx = 0, x IN routeHistory | CASE WHEN x.trips > mx THEN x.trips ELSE mx END) | rh.route][0] AS mostFrequentRoute ORDER BY totalSpend DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:OPERATES]->(t:Train) WITH sm, count(DISTINCT t) AS trainsOperated MATCH (sm)-[:RESPONDED_TO]->(i:Incident) WITH sm, trainsOperated, count(i) AS incidentsHandled, collect(DISTINCT i.severity) AS severitiesHandled MATCH (t2:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE (sm)-[:OPERATES]->(t2) WITH sm, trainsOperated, incidentsHandled, severitiesHandled, count(DISTINCT r) AS routesCovered, sum(r.totalDistance) AS totalDistanceCovered WITH sm, trainsOperated, incidentsHandled, severitiesHandled, routesCovered, totalDistanceCovered, CASE WHEN 'critical' IN severitiesHandled THEN 4 WHEN 'high' IN severitiesHandled THEN 3 WHEN 'medium' IN severitiesHandled THEN 2 ELSE 1 END AS maxSeverityScore RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, sm.role, trainsOperated, routesCovered, totalDistanceCovered, incidentsHandled, maxSeverityScore ORDER BY maxSeverityScore DESC, incidentsHandled DESC LIMIT 20
MATCH (t:Train) RETURN t.id, t.model, t.capacity, t.status, t.manufacturingYear ORDER BY t.manufacturingYear ASC
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.zone IS NOT NULL RETURN s.zone, count(s) AS stationCount ORDER BY s.zone
MATCH (tk:Ticket {status: 'active'}) WHERE tk.travelDate = date() RETURN count(tk) AS todayActiveTickets
MATCH (d:Depot) RETURN d.name, d.location, d.capacity, d.currentOccupancy ORDER BY d.currentOccupancy DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.registrationDate >= date() - duration('P30D') RETURN p.name, p.id, p.registrationDate ORDER BY p.registrationDate DESC
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {status: 'in_progress'}) RETURN ml.id, ml.maintenanceType, ml.startDate, ml.technician, ml.priority ORDER BY ml.priority DESC
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.date = date() AND j.status IN ['on_time', 'delayed'] RETURN j.id, j.status, j.scheduledDeparture, j.actualDeparture, j.routeName ORDER BY j.scheduledDeparture
MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.isActive = false SET r.archivedAt = datetime() RETURN count(r) AS archivedRoutes
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P099'})-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.status = 'active' SET tk.seatClass = 'premium' RETURN tk.id, tk.seatClass, tk.travelDate
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WHERE t.type = 'express' RETURN s.name, count(t) AS expressServices ORDER BY expressServices DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.cardType = 'annual' WITH count(p) AS annualCardHolders, avg(tc.remainingBalance) AS avgBalance, sum(tc.remainingBalance) AS totalBalance RETURN annualCardHolders, round(avgBalance * 100) / 100 AS avgBalance, totalBalance

MATCH (i:Incident)-[:OCCURRED_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, count(i) AS totalIncidents, count(CASE WHEN i.severity = 'critical' THEN 1 END) AS criticalCount RETURN s.name, totalIncidents, criticalCount ORDER BY criticalCount DESC, totalIncidents DESC LIMIT 15
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.zone = '1' WITH t, count(s) AS zone1Stops WHERE zone1Stops >= 3 RETURN t.id, t.model, t.type, zone1Stops ORDER BY zone1Stops DESC

MATCH (sm:StaffMember) WHERE sm.role = 'driver' AND sm.licenceExpiry < date() + duration('P60D') RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, sm.licenceExpiry, duration.between(date(), sm.licenceExpiry).days AS daysUntilExpiry ORDER BY daysUntilExpiry ASC

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.saleDate.year = date().year WITH tss.saleDate.month AS month, tss.ticketType AS ticketType, sum(tss.totalSales) AS revenue RETURN month, ticketType, revenue ORDER BY month, revenue DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P7D') WITH j.date AS travelDate, count(DISTINCT p) AS passengerCount RETURN travelDate, passengerCount ORDER BY travelDate

MATCH (t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) WHERE d.location = 'Southside' WITH d, collect(t.id) AS trainIds, count(t) AS totalTrains, count(CASE WHEN t.status = 'active' THEN 1 END) AS activeTrains RETURN d.name, totalTrains, activeTrains, totalTrains - activeTrains AS inactiveTrains

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH r, count(j) AS journeyCount, avg(CASE WHEN j.actualArrival > j.scheduledArrival THEN duration.between(j.scheduledArrival, j.actualArrival).minutes ELSE 0 END) AS avgDelayMins RETURN r.name, journeyCount, round(avgDelayMins * 10) / 10 AS avgDelayMins ORDER BY avgDelayMins DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p.registrationDate.year AS cohortYear, count(DISTINCT p) AS passengers, sum(tk.price) AS totalRevenue RETURN cohortYear, passengers, totalRevenue, round(totalRevenue / passengers * 100) / 100 AS revenuePerPassenger ORDER BY cohortYear

MATCH (pl:Platform {status: 'operational'})<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(s:Station) WITH s, count(pl) AS operationalPlatforms MATCH (pl2:Platform)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(s) WITH s, operationalPlatforms, count(pl2) AS totalPlatforms RETURN s.name, totalPlatforms, operationalPlatforms, totalPlatforms - operationalPlatforms AS closedPlatforms ORDER BY closedPlatforms DESC

MATCH (t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH t, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS routes MATCH (t)-[:STORED_AT]->(d:Depot) MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t) WHERE ml.status = 'scheduled' AND ml.scheduledDate <= date() + duration('P14D') WITH t, routes, d, collect({type: ml.maintenanceType, date: ml.scheduledDate}) AS upcomingMaintenance RETURN t.id, t.model, t.status, d.name AS depot, routes, upcomingMaintenance ORDER BY size(upcomingMaintenance) DESC

MATCH (p1:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey)<-[:BOARDED]-(p2:Passenger) WHERE p1.id < p2.id WITH p1, p2, count(j) AS sharedJourneys WHERE sharedJourneys >= 10 RETURN p1.name, p1.id, p2.name, p2.id, sharedJourneys ORDER BY sharedJourneys DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE r.type = 'commuter' WITH s, count(DISTINCT t) AS commuterServices MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t2:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r2:Route) WHERE r2.type = 'intercity' WITH s, commuterServices, count(DISTINCT t2) AS intercityServices RETURN s.name, commuterServices, intercityServices, commuterServices + intercityServices AS totalServices ORDER BY totalServices DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.status = 'completed' WITH t, ml ORDER BY ml.completedDate DESC WITH t, collect(ml)[0] AS latestMaintenance WITH t, latestMaintenance WHERE duration.between(latestMaintenance.completedDate, date()).days > 90 MATCH (t)-[:STORED_AT]->(d:Depot) RETURN t.id, t.model, d.name AS currentDepot, latestMaintenance.maintenanceType AS lastServiceType, latestMaintenance.completedDate AS lastServiceDate, duration.between(latestMaintenance.completedDate, date()).days AS daysSinceService ORDER BY daysSinceService DESC

MATCH (r:Route) WHERE r.isActive = true OPTIONAL MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime() - duration('P30D') WITH r, count(i) AS recentIncidents OPTIONAL MATCH (r)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH r, recentIncidents, count(j) AS recentJourneys OPTIONAL MATCH (r)<-[:FOR_ROUTE]-(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.purchaseDate >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH r, recentIncidents, recentJourneys, sum(tk.price) AS recentRevenue RETURN r.name, r.type, recentIncidents, recentJourneys, coalesce(recentRevenue, 0) AS recentRevenue ORDER BY recentRevenue DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, j.date.dayOfWeek AS dayOfWeek, count(j) AS journeyCount WITH p, dayOfWeek, journeyCount ORDER BY p.id, journeyCount DESC WITH p, collect({day: dayOfWeek, count: journeyCount})[0] AS preferredDay RETURN p.name, p.id, preferredDay.day AS preferredDayOfWeek, preferredDay.count AS journeysOnThatDay ORDER BY journeysOnThatDay DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (s:Station)-[:CONNECTS_TO*2..4]->(s2:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Central Station' AND s.id <> s2.id WITH DISTINCT s2 MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: s2.id}) WHERE dpl.logDate >= date() - duration('P30D') WITH s2, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgPassengers RETURN s2.name, round(avgPassengers) AS avgDailyPassengers ORDER BY avgPassengers DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:OPERATES]->(t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime() - duration('P90D') WITH sm, count(DISTINCT i) AS incidentsOnRoutes, collect(DISTINCT i.severity) AS severitiesEncountered WITH sm, incidentsOnRoutes, severitiesEncountered, size([x IN severitiesEncountered WHERE x IN ['critical', 'high']]) AS seriousIncidentTypes WHERE seriousIncidentTypes > 0 RETURN sm.name, sm.employeeId, sm.role, incidentsOnRoutes, severitiesEncountered, seriousIncidentTypes ORDER BY seriousIncidentTypes DESC, incidentsOnRoutes DESC

MATCH (tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.purchaseDate >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH tk.seatClass AS seatClass, tk.purchaseDate.month AS month, count(tk) AS sold, sum(tk.price) AS revenue WITH seatClass, month, sold, revenue ORDER BY seatClass, month RETURN seatClass, collect({month: month, ticketsSold: sold, revenue: revenue}) AS monthlySales

MATCH (d:Depot)-[:STORES]->(t:Train) WITH d, count(t) AS totalCapacity, sum(CASE WHEN t.status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeCount, sum(CASE WHEN t.status = 'under_maintenance' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS maintenanceCount, sum(CASE WHEN t.status = 'decommissioned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS decommissionedCount WITH d, totalCapacity, activeCount, maintenanceCount, decommissionedCount, round(100.0 * activeCount / totalCapacity) AS activePercent RETURN d.name, d.location, totalCapacity, activeCount, maintenanceCount, decommissionedCount, activePercent ORDER BY activePercent DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WHERE tk.travelDate >= date() AND tk.travelDate <= date() + duration('P7D') WITH p, count(tk) AS upcomingTrips, collect({ticketId: tk.id, date: tk.travelDate, route: tk.routeName, class: tk.seatClass}) AS upcomingTickets RETURN p.name, p.id, p.contactEmail, upcomingTrips, upcomingTickets ORDER BY upcomingTrips DESC LIMIT 30

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH r, j.date.quarter AS quarter, j.date.year AS year, count(j) AS journeys, avg(j.passengerCount) AS avgPassengers, sum(j.revenue) AS quarterRevenue RETURN r.name, year, quarter, journeys, round(avgPassengers) AS avgPassengersPerJourney, quarterRevenue ORDER BY r.name, year, quarter

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:BOARDED]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH p, count(DISTINCT r) AS distinctRoutes, count(j) AS totalJourneys WHERE distinctRoutes >= 5 MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p, distinctRoutes, totalJourneys, avg(tk.price) AS avgTicketPrice, sum(CASE WHEN tk.seatClass = 'premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS premiumTickets, count(tk) AS totalTickets WITH p, distinctRoutes, totalJourneys, avgTicketPrice, premiumTickets, totalTickets, round(100.0 * premiumTickets / totalTickets) AS premiumPercent RETURN p.name, p.id, distinctRoutes, totalJourneys, round(avgTicketPrice * 100) / 100 AS avgTicketPrice, premiumPercent ORDER BY distinctRoutes DESC LIMIT 25

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WITH s, t.type AS trainType, count(t) AS serviceCount WITH s, collect({type: trainType, count: serviceCount}) AS serviceBreakdown, sum(serviceCount) AS totalServices MATCH (i:Incident)-[:OCCURRED_AT]->(s) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime() - duration('P180D') WITH s, serviceBreakdown, totalServices, count(i) AS incidentCount, sum(CASE WHEN i.severity IN ['critical', 'high'] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS severeIncidents MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: s.id}) WHERE dpl.logDate >= date() - duration('P180D') WITH s, serviceBreakdown, totalServices, incidentCount, severeIncidents, sum(dpl.passengerCount) AS halfYearPassengers RETURN s.name, s.zone, totalServices, serviceBreakdown, incidentCount, severeIncidents, halfYearPassengers, round(halfYearPassengers / 180) AS avgDailyPassengers ORDER BY halfYearPassengers DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (j1:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r1:Route)-[:CONNECTS_TO]->(hub:Station)<-[:CONNECTS_TO]-(r2:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j2:Journey) WHERE j1.arrivalTime < j2.departureTime AND duration.between(j1.arrivalTime, j2.departureTime).minutes >= 5 AND duration.between(j1.arrivalTime, j2.departureTime).minutes <= 45 WITH hub, r1, r2, count(*) AS connectionOpportunities MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: hub.id}) WITH hub, r1, r2, connectionOpportunities, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgHubPassengers RETURN hub.name, r1.name AS inboundRoute, r2.name AS outboundRoute, connectionOpportunities, round(avgHubPassengers) AS avgDailyHubPassengers ORDER BY connectionOpportunities DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.status = 'delayed' WITH p, count(j) AS delayedJourneys, sum(CASE WHEN duration.between(j.scheduledArrival, j.actualArrival).minutes > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantDelays MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk2:Ticket) WITH p, delayedJourneys, significantDelays, count(tk2) AS totalTickets WITH p, delayedJourneys, significantDelays, totalTickets, round(100.0 * delayedJourneys / totalTickets) AS delayExposurePct WHERE delayExposurePct > 25 RETURN p.name, p.id, p.contactEmail, delayedJourneys, significantDelays, totalTickets, delayExposurePct ORDER BY significantDelays DESC LIMIT 20

MATCH (t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH t, r MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t) WHERE ml.status IN ['completed', 'scheduled'] WITH t, r, count(ml) AS totalMaintenances, sum(CASE WHEN ml.status = 'completed' THEN ml.cost ELSE 0 END) AS totalMaintenanceCost, sum(CASE WHEN ml.status = 'scheduled' THEN ml.estimatedCost ELSE 0 END) AS projectedCost WITH r, count(DISTINCT t) AS trainsOnRoute, sum(totalMaintenanceCost) AS historicMaintenanceCost, sum(projectedCost) AS projectedMaintenanceCost, avg(totalMaintenances) AS avgMaintenancesPerTrain MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.routeId = r.id RETURN r.name, trainsOnRoute, round(avgMaintenancesPerTrain * 10) / 10 AS avgMaintenancesPerTrain, historicMaintenanceCost, projectedMaintenanceCost, sum(tss.totalSales) AS totalRevenue, round(sum(tss.totalSales) - historicMaintenanceCost) AS netPosition ORDER BY netPosition DESC

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WITH s, r, t MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P90D') WITH s, r, t, count(j) AS journeyFrequency MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime() - duration('P90D') WITH s, r, journeyFrequency, count(i) AS routeIncidents MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {stationId: s.id}) WHERE dpl.logDate >= date() - duration('P90D') WITH s, r, journeyFrequency, routeIncidents, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgStationLoad, sum(dpl.passengerCount) AS totalStationPassengers WITH s, collect({route: r.name, journeys: journeyFrequency, incidents: routeIncidents}) AS routeMetrics, avgStationLoad, totalStationPassengers, sum(journeyFrequency) AS totalJourneys, sum(routeIncidents) AS totalRouteIncidents RETURN s.name, s.zone, size(routeMetrics) AS routesServed, totalJourneys, totalRouteIncidents, round(avgStationLoad) AS avgDailyLoad, totalStationPassengers, round(100.0 * totalRouteIncidents / totalJourneys * 100) / 100 AS incidentRatePct, routeMetrics ORDER BY totalStationPassengers DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH p, r, count(j) AS tripsOnRoute, sum(tk.price) AS spendOnRoute WITH p, r.name AS routeName, tripsOnRoute, spendOnRoute ORDER BY p.id, tripsOnRoute DESC WITH p, collect({route: routeName, trips: tripsOnRoute, spend: spendOnRoute}) AS routeProfile, sum(tripsOnRoute) AS totalTrips, sum(spendOnRoute) AS totalAnnualSpend MATCH (p)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) MATCH (p)-[:BOARDED]->(j2:Journey) WHERE j2.date >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH p, routeProfile, totalTrips, totalAnnualSpend, tc.cardType AS cardType, count(DISTINCT j2.date.month) AS activeMonths WITH p, routeProfile, totalTrips, totalAnnualSpend, cardType, activeMonths, round(totalAnnualSpend / activeMonths * 100) / 100 AS avgMonthlySpend WHERE activeMonths >= 6 RETURN p.name, p.id, cardType, totalTrips, totalAnnualSpend, activeMonths, avgMonthlySpend, size(routeProfile) AS distinctRoutesTravelled ORDER BY totalAnnualSpend DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE j.date >= date() - duration('P365D') WITH p, r, j, tk MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r) WHERE i.timestamp >= datetime(j.date) AND i.timestamp <= datetime(j.date) + duration('P1D') WITH p, j, tk, r, count(i) AS incidentsOnJourneyDay, collect(DISTINCT i.severity) AS severitiesExperienced MATCH (p)-[:HOLDS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH p, tc, count(j) AS totalJourneys, sum(tk.price) AS totalSpend, sum(CASE WHEN incidentsOnJourneyDay > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS journeysWithIncidents, sum(CASE WHEN 'critical' IN severitiesExperienced OR 'high' IN severitiesExperienced THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS journeysWithSeriousIncidents, collect(DISTINCT r.name) AS routesTravelled WITH p, tc, totalJourneys, totalSpend, journeysWithIncidents, journeysWithSeriousIncidents, routesTravelled, round(100.0 * journeysWithIncidents / totalJourneys) AS incidentExposurePct WHERE totalJourneys >= 10 MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE dpl.stationId IN [(p)-[:BOARDED]->(j2:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r2:Route)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(s:Station) | s.id] WITH p, tc, totalJourneys, totalSpend, journeysWithIncidents, journeysWithSeriousIncidents, routesTravelled, incidentExposurePct, avg(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgCrowdingOnUsedRoutes RETURN p.name, p.id, tc.cardType, totalJourneys, round(totalSpend * 100) / 100 AS totalAnnualSpend, journeysWithIncidents, journeysWithSeriousIncidents, incidentExposurePct, size(routesTravelled) AS distinctRoutes, routesTravelled, round(avgCrowdingOnUsedRoutes) AS avgRouteCrowding ORDER BY journeysWithSeriousIncidents DESC, incidentExposurePct DESC LIMIT 20
